## Font submission

Font slug:

Source URL:

License:

Submitter GitHub handle:

## Checklist

- [ ] I added `registry/fonts/<slug>/font.json`.
- [ ] I added `.woff2` files in `registry/fonts/<slug>/files/`.
- [ ] I added the license text in `registry/fonts/<slug>/files/`.
- [ ] The font license allows redistribution.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build:registry`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate:registry`.
